name: gemini-thinking-mode-extension
description: Automatically enables Thinking Mode on Google Gemini AI chat

scripts.copy-assets: cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r icons dist/ && cp LICENSE dist/ && cp src/popup.html dist/ && cp src/popup.css dist/ && cp -r _locales dist/
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../../gemini-thinking-mode-extension.zip .
